name: PanelContentDirective
description:
Applies the panel content style to a div element. ```html
Panel Content
```

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: aria-label attribute of the host element element.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: aria-labelledby attribute of the host element element.

inputs.name: height
inputs.description: Custom height of the content container.

inputs.name: maxHeight
inputs.description: Custom max-height of the content container.

inputs.name: minHeight
inputs.description: Custom min-height of the content container.

inputs.name: noPadding
inputs.description: Whether the content should have no padding.

inputs.name: role
inputs.description: role attribute of the host element.

inputs.name: transparent
inputs.description: Whether the content has transparent background.
